mcp-stdio.notes: Also supports `claude mcp add` CLI for interactive setup.

mcp-sse.notes: Custom headers supported since 0.2.106. Being superseded by Streamable HTTP.

mcp-tools.notes: Tool search defers loading for large tool sets — avoids flooding the context window.

mcp-resources.notes: Accessible via @-mention typeahead but not proactively surfaced or browsable.

mcp-prompts.notes: Officially listed as supported but limited documentation. No dedicated prompt UI.

mcp-sampling.notes: Not supported. No agent supports this yet.

mcp-roots.notes: Listed on modelcontextprotocol.io but no docs or changelog evidence.

mcp-elicitation.notes: Servers request input mid-task via dialog. Hookable via Elicitation/ElicitationResult events.

mcp-oauth.notes: In-session login flow. RFC 9728 discovery for finding auth servers.

mcp-config-project.notes: .mcp.json committed to repo. Shareable via version control.

background-monitor.notes: Monitor tool for streaming background events

scheduled-tasks.notes: CronCreate/CronDelete/CronList tools for session-scoped scheduled tasks

code-search.notes: Glob and Grep tools since earliest version

semantic-search.notes: No embedding-based semantic search. Uses pattern matching via Grep/Glob

web-search.notes: Claude can now search the web

web-fetch.notes: Web fetch tool lets Claude view URLs

lsp-integration.notes: LSP tool available via code intelligence plugins. Not built-in

browser-control.notes: No built-in browser control. Available via MCP

image-input.notes: Drag in or copy/paste image files directly into the prompt

subagent-spawning.notes: Agent tool for spawning subagents with own context window

task-management.notes: Todo/Task tools for tracking work progress

project-instructions.notes: CLAUDE.md in project root since earliest version

org-instructions.notes: Managed policy CLAUDE.md deployed via MDM/Group Policy

path-scoped-rules.notes: .claude/rules/ with paths frontmatter for glob-scoped instructions

agents-md-compat.notes: Can import AGENTS.md via @AGENTS.md in CLAUDE.md, but does not read it natively

auto-memory.notes: Memory system. Auto memory writes notes across sessions

context-compaction.notes: Automatic conversation compaction for infinite conversation length

hook-tool-use.notes: Supports tool-specific filtering via matcher patterns.; Post: PostToolUse event. Supports tool-specific filtering via matcher patterns. continueOnBlock option added in 2.1.139 to feed rejection reason back to Claude.

hook-prompt-validation.notes: UserPromptSubmit event. Can block or augment prompts before processing.

hook-agent-stop.notes: Stop event. Can force continuation by returning non-zero exit code.

hook-response-tracking.notes: Notification hook with systemMessage (1.0.64); StopFailure for errors (2.1.78)

hook-session-lifecycle.notes: SessionStart added in 1.0.62; SessionEnd added in 1.0.85

hook-shell-control.notes: Via PreToolUse matcher on Bash tool

hook-file-access.notes: Via PreToolUse matcher on Read|Edit|Write tools

hook-mcp-control.notes: Via PreToolUse matcher on mcp__* tools; also Elicitation hooks

hook-compaction.notes: PreCompact (1.0.48) can block; PostCompact (2.1.72) fires after
